channel.title: Jraft Creative Blog
channel.description: Tips, guides, and insights on web design, SEO, and digital marketing for Singapore businesses.

item.title: Why Parents Google Before Choosing a Tuition Centre
item.description: Singapore parents research tuition centres online before visiting. Here's what they search for, what they expect, and what it means for your marketing.
item.author: Jeremy Cheong

item.title: How to Choose a Digital Marketing Agency in Singapore
item.description: Hiring a marketing agency is a big decision. What Singapore business owners should look for — and the red flags to watch out for — when choosing one.
item.author: Jeremy Cheong

item.title: Google Ads vs Meta Ads: Which Should Your Singapore Business Start With?
item.description: Should you spend your ad budget on Google or Meta? A practical breakdown of both platforms — when each works best and what they cost in Singapore.
item.author: Jeremy Cheong

item.title: AI Search Optimisation for Tuition Centres in Singapore: What You Need to Know
item.description: Singapore parents use ChatGPT and Gemini to find tuition. How tuition centres can get recommended by AI — strategies for the Singapore education market.
item.author: Jeremy Cheong

item.title: AI Search Optimisation for Restaurants in Singapore: A Practical Guide
item.description: How Singapore restaurants can get recommended by ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity. Structured data, review strategy, Google Business Profile.
item.author: Jeremy Cheong

item.title: What Is GEO? The New Way Customers Find Businesses
item.description: GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation) is how brands get recommended by ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity. Learn what it is, how it differs from SEO, and why it matters.
item.author: Jeremy Cheong

item.title: Why AI Search Matters for Singapore Businesses
item.description: Singapore has the world's second highest AI adoption rate. How AI search is reshaping how customers find businesses — and which industries are hit hardest.
item.author: Jeremy Cheong

item.title: Why Paid Ads Are Non-Negotiable for Singapore Small Businesses in 2026
item.description: Organic reach alone won't cut it. Why Singapore SMEs need paid advertising — and how to get real returns from Google Ads and Meta Ads.
item.author: Jeremy Cheong

item.title: What Makes a Good Business Website? 7 Things Singapore Customers Expect
item.description: Find out what Singapore customers actually look for in a business website — from fast loading to mobile design, trust signals, and clear pricing.
item.author: Jeremy Cheong

item.title: Social Media Marketing for Singapore SMEs: A Practical Guide
item.description: A no-nonsense guide to social media marketing for Singapore small businesses — which platforms to focus on, what to post, and how to measure results.
item.author: Jeremy Cheong

item.title: Why Every F&B Business in Singapore Needs a Website
item.description: Singapore's F&B industry is fiercely competitive. Here's why restaurants, cafes, and food businesses need their own website — not just a social media page.
item.author: Jeremy Cheong

item.title: 5 SEO Mistakes Singapore Small Businesses Make
item.description: Common SEO errors that cost Singapore SMEs organic traffic and leads — and how to fix each one to rank higher on Google.
item.author: Jeremy Cheong

item.title: How Much Does a Website Cost in Singapore in 2026?
item.description: A detailed breakdown of website design and development costs in Singapore — from simple landing pages to custom ecommerce builds, with real pricing in SGD.
item.author: Jeremy Cheong
